action.reasoning: Observation: best Quickdraw accuracy is 0.1835 from 2-epoch full CLIP fine-tuning on Sketch with default augmentation; 1 epoch underfits and 10 epochs overfits, while frozen and aggressive Quickdraw-style augmentation underperform. Analysis: target optimum likely depends on a small amount of backbone adaptation, so testing the local training curve around the 2-epoch optimum is the highest-value next step. Decision: run the same validated Sketch-only CLIP setup for 3 epochs with default augmentation and submit eval to see whether a slightly longer but not overfit run improves over 0.1835.
